name: KUUDEN MYAKU NO JUTSU (STATIC PULSE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: H *

This highly versatile technique creates a short but powerful magnetic field, which can have various effects.

Immobilize (7 Chakra): Target a single creature to magnetically hold all metal-based equipment it has. It cannot wield any metal-based weapons, and cannot move if its armor is mostly metal. Lasts 1 round, Fortitude negates, CR applies.

Defensive Pulse (12 Chakra): You create an aura around yourself, making you immune to any metallic weapon of up to Large size, which are held in place before reaching you.

This pulse lasts 1 round, and during that time any metal-based weapons you try to use are also stopped by the aura.

Instant Defensive Pulse (3 Chakra): This is a defensive maneuver, which can be activated as an instant action no more than once per round against an attack made with a (mostly) metallic weapon. If successful, you suffer no damage from the attack. Using the technique this way requires Half Seals rather than Hand Seals.
